payload.note: Omar Haddad, screened under 'O Haddad' with a US DOB of 1992-03-21, conflicts with the SDN list entity 'Jane Citizen', listed as Syrian with a DOB of 1971-08-09. Further investigation is required to reconcile these discrepancies.
